_**User (2025-04-29 01:54:00Z)**_

我需要在这个项目中进行这个项目的开发
需求背景：      某企业是一家医护培训机构。由于要开设相关课程，该企业需定制在线培训网站。该网站要求如下：1、网站以视频为主，非会员用户可以观看该网站，限时5分钟，会员用户可以看全部内容，会员的信息包括姓名、身份证号、联系电话、会员号等；2、视频要包含内部资料和外部资料，内部资料仅运行会员进行观看下载；3、网站后台需要能够监测到是哪位会员看了什么视频、看了多长时间，同时，所有视频要支持记忆播放；4、开通会员的方式为在线支付（如无条件可模拟）；5、网站后台需对客户、视频、管理员进行常规管理
我需要你把前端页面放入zina-tch-view中
我使用的技术栈为springboot3-version.4.5和
vue3

根据您的需求，我们需要开发一个包含以下功能的前端系统：

1. 用户系统：
   - 会员注册/登录
   - 会员信息管理（姓名、身份证号、联系电话、会员号等）
   - 非会员用户限制观看5分钟

2. 视频系统：
   - 视频分类（内部资料/外部资料）
   - 视频播放（支持记忆播放）
   - 视频下载（仅会员）
   - 观看记录统计

3. 支付系统：
   - 会员开通支付功能

4. 后台管理系统：
   - 客户管理
   - 视频管理
   - 管理员管理
   - 观看记录统计

我建议我们按照以下步骤进行开发：

1. 首先配置前端项目的基础依赖和路由
2. 创建基础页面结构
3. 实现用户认证系统
4. 开发视频播放和管理功能
5. 集成支付系统
6. 开发后台管理系统

```diff
+ import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'
+ 
+ const routes = [
+   {
+     path: '/',
+     name: 'Home',
+     component: () =&gt; import('../views/Home.vue')
+   },
+   {
+     path: '/login',
+     name: 'Login',
+     component: () =&gt; import('../views/Login.vue')
+   },
+   {
+     path: '/register',
+     name: 'Register',
+     component: () =&gt; import('../views/Register.vue')
+   },
+   {
+     path: '/video/:id',
+     name: 'VideoDetail',
+     component: () =&gt; import('../views/VideoDetail.vue')
+   },
+   {
+     path: '/member',
+     name: 'MemberCenter',
+     component: () =&gt; import('../views/MemberCenter.vue'),
+     meta: { requiresAuth: true }
+   },
+   {
+     path: '/admin',
+     name: 'Admin',
+     component: () =&gt; import('../views/admin/AdminLayout.vue'),
+     meta: { requiresAuth: true, requiresAdmin: true },
+     children: [
+       {
+         path: 'dashboard',
+         name: 'AdminDashboard',
+         component: () =&gt; import('../views/admin/Dashboard.vue')
+       },
+       {
+         path: 'users',
+         name: 'UserManagement',
+         component: () =&gt; import('../views/admin/UserManagement.vue')
+       },
+       {
+         path: 'videos',
+         name: 'VideoManagement',
+         component: () =&gt; import('../views/admin/VideoManagement.vue')
+       },
+       {
+         path: 'statistics',
+         name: 'Statistics',
+         component: () =&gt; import('../views/admin/Statistics.vue')
+       }
+     ]
+   }
+ ]
+ 
+ const router = createRouter({
+   history: createWebHistory(),
+   routes
+ })
+ 
+ // 路由守卫
+ router.beforeEach((to, from, next) =&gt; {
+   const isAuthenticated = localStorage.getItem('token')
+   const isAdmin = localStorage.getItem('isAdmin') === 'true'
+ 
+   if (to.meta.requiresAuth &amp;&amp; !isAuthenticated) {
+     next('/login')
+   } else if (to.meta.requiresAdmin &amp;&amp; !isAdmin) {
+     next('/')
+   } else {
+     next()
+   }
+ })
+ 
+ export default router 
```

</details>

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,69 @@
- 
+ import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
+ import { ref } from 'vue'
+ import axios from 'axios'
+ 
+ export const useUserStore = defineStore('user', () =&gt; {
+   const user = ref(null)
+   const token = ref(localStorage.getItem('token') || '')
+   const isAdmin = ref(localStorage.getItem('isAdmin') === 'true')
+ 
+   const login = async (credentials) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.post('/api/auth/login', credentials)
+       token.value = response.data.token
+       user.value = response.data.user
+       isAdmin.value = response.data.user.isAdmin
+       
+       localStorage.setItem('token', token.value)
+       localStorage.setItem('isAdmin', isAdmin.value)
+       
+       return true
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Login failed:', error)
+       return false
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   const register = async (userData) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.post('/api/auth/register', userData)
+       return response.data
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Registration failed:', error)
+       throw error
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   const logout = () =&gt; {
+     user.value = null
+     token.value = ''
+     isAdmin.value = false
+     localStorage.removeItem('token')
+     localStorage.removeItem('isAdmin')
+   }
+ 
+   const checkAuth = async () =&gt; {
+     if (!token.value) return false
+     
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.get('/api/auth/me', {
+         headers: { Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${token.value}&#96; }
+       })
+       user.value = response.data
+       return true
+     } catch (error) {
+       logout()
+       return false
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   return {
+     user,
+     token,
+     isAdmin,
+     login,
+     register,
+     logout,
+     checkAuth
+   }
+ }) 
```

</details>

```diff
+ import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
+ import { ref } from 'vue'
+ import axios from 'axios'
+ 
+ export const useVideoStore = defineStore('video', () =&gt; {
+   const videos = ref([])
+   const currentVideo = ref(null)
+   const watchHistory = ref([])
+   const watchProgress = ref({})
+ 
+   const fetchVideos = async () =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.get('/api/videos')
+       videos.value = response.data
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Failed to fetch videos:', error)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   const getVideoById = async (id) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.get(&#96;/api/videos/${id}&#96;)
+       currentVideo.value = response.data
+       return response.data
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Failed to fetch video:', error)
+       return null
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   const updateWatchProgress = async (videoId, progress) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       await axios.post(&#96;/api/videos/${videoId}/progress&#96;, { progress })
+       watchProgress.value[videoId] = progress
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Failed to update watch progress:', error)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   const getWatchHistory = async () =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.get('/api/videos/history')
+       watchHistory.value = response.data
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Failed to fetch watch history:', error)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   const downloadVideo = async (videoId) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await axios.get(&#96;/api/videos/${videoId}/download&#96;, {
+         responseType: 'blob'
+       })
+       const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data]))
+       const link = document.createElement('a')
+       link.href = url
+       link.setAttribute('download', &#96;${videoId}.mp4&#96;)
+       document.body.appendChild(link)
+       link.click()
+       link.remove()
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error('Failed to download video:', error)
+       throw error
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   return {
+     videos,
+     currentVideo,
+     watchHistory,
+     watchProgress,
+     fetchVideos,
+     getVideoById,
+     updateWatchProgress,
+     getWatchHistory,
+     downloadVideo
+   }
+ }) 
```

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,70 @@
- 
+ import axios from 'axios'
+ import { useUserStore } from '../stores/user'
+ 
+ const api = axios.create({
+   baseURL: '/api',
+   timeout: 10000
+ })
+ 
+ // 请求拦截器
+ api.interceptors.request.use(
+   (config) =&gt; {
+     const userStore = useUserStore()
+     if (userStore.token) {
+       config.headers.Authorization = &#96;Bearer ${userStore.token}&#96;
+     }
+     return config
+   },
+   (error) =&gt; {
+     return Promise.reject(error)
+   }
+ )
+ 
+ // 响应拦截器
+ api.interceptors.response.use(
+   (response) =&gt; {
+     return response.data
+   },
+   (error) =&gt; {
+     if (error.response?.status === 401) {
+       const userStore = useUserStore()
+       userStore.logout()
+     }
+     return Promise.reject(error)
+   }
+ )
+ 
+ export const auth = {
+   login: (credentials) =&gt; api.post('/auth/login', credentials),
+   register: (userData) =&gt; api.post('/auth/register', userData),
+   getProfile: () =&gt; api.get('/auth/me')
+ }
+ 
+ export const video = {
+   getList: () =&gt; api.get('/videos'),
+   getDetail: (id) =&gt; api.get(&#96;/videos/${id}&#96;),
+   updateProgress: (id, progress) =&gt; api.post(&#96;/videos/${id}/progress&#96;, { progress }),
+   getHistory: () =&gt; api.get('/videos/history'),
+   download: (id) =&gt; api.get(&#96;/videos/${id}/download&#96;, { responseType: 'blob' })
+ }
+ 
+ export const member = {
+   getInfo: () =&gt; api.get('/member/info'),
+   updateInfo: (data) =&gt; api.put('/member/info', data),
+   getOrders: () =&gt; api.get('/member/orders'),
+   createOrder: (data) =&gt; api.post('/member/orders', data)
+ }
+ 
+ export const admin = {
+   getDashboard: () =&gt; api.get('/admin/dashboard'),
+   getUsers: (params) =&gt; api.get('/admin/users', { params }),
+   updateUser: (id, data) =&gt; api.put(&#96;/admin/users/${id}&#96;, data),
+   deleteUser: (id) =&gt; api.delete(&#96;/admin/users/${id}&#96;),
+   getVideos: (params) =&gt; api.get('/admin/videos', { params }),
+   createVideo: (data) =&gt; api.post('/admin/videos', data),
+   updateVideo: (id, data) =&gt; api.put(&#96;/admin/videos/${id}&#96;, data),
+   deleteVideo: (id) =&gt; api.delete(&#96;/admin/videos/${id}&#96;),
+   getStatistics: (params) =&gt; api.get('/admin/statistics', { params })
+ }
+ 
+ export default api 
```

```diff
+             &lt;/el-col&gt;
+             &lt;el-col :span="12"&gt;
+               &lt;div class="member-benefits"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3&gt;会员特权&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;ul&gt;
+                   &lt;li&gt;无限观看所有课程&lt;/li&gt;
+                   &lt;li&gt;下载课程资料&lt;/li&gt;
+                   &lt;li&gt;专属客服支持&lt;/li&gt;
+                   &lt;li&gt;优先参与线下活动&lt;/li&gt;
+                 &lt;/ul&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/el-col&gt;
+           &lt;/el-row&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/el-main&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;el-footer&gt;
+         &lt;nav-footer /&gt;
+       &lt;/el-footer&gt;
+     &lt;/el-container&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/template&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;script setup&gt;
+ import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'
+ import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
+ import { useVideoStore } from '../stores/video'
+ import NavHeader from '../components/NavHeader.vue'
+ import NavFooter from '../components/NavFooter.vue'
+ 
+ const router = useRouter()
+ const videoStore = useVideoStore()
+ const videos = ref([])
+ const banners = ref([
+   {
+     id: 1,
+     title: '专业护理培训',
+     image: '/images/banner1.jpg'
+   },
+   {
+     id: 2,
+     title: '最新医疗技术',
+     image: '/images/banner2.jpg'
+   }
+ ])
+ 
+ onMounted(async () =&gt; {
+   await videoStore.fetchVideos()
+   videos.value = videoStore.videos
+ })
+ 
+ const goToVideo = (id) =&gt; {
+   router.push(&#96;/video/${id}&#96;)
+ }
+ 
+ const goToMember = () =&gt; {
+   router.push('/member')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .home {
+   min-height: 100vh;
+ }
+ 
+ .banner {
+   margin-bottom: 40px;
+ }
+ 
+ .banner img {
+   width: 100%;
+   height: 100%;
+   object-fit: cover;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-section {
+   margin-bottom: 40px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-card {
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   transition: transform 0.3s;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-card:hover {
+   transform: translateY(-5px);
+ }
+ 
+ .video-cover {
+   width: 100%;
+   height: 200px;
+   object-fit: cover;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-info {
+   padding: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-info h3 {
+   margin: 0;
+   font-size: 16px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-info p {
+   margin: 10px 0;
+   color: #666;
+   font-size: 14px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   color: #999;
+   font-size: 12px;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-section {
+   background-color: #f5f7fa;
+   padding: 40px;
+   border-radius: 8px;
+   margin-bottom: 40px;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-info {
+   text-align: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-info h2 {
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-benefits {
+   padding: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-benefits h3 {
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-benefits ul {
+   list-style: none;
+   padding: 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-benefits li {
+   margin-bottom: 10px;
+   padding-left: 20px;
+   position: relative;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-benefits li:before {
+   content: '✓';
+   position: absolute;
+   left: 0;
+   color: #409EFF;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt;
```

```diff
+
```

```diff
+           &lt;el-col :span="16"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="video-player"&gt;

+                 ref="videoPlayer"
+                 :options="playerOptions"
+                 @timeupdate="onTimeUpdate"
+                 @ended="onVideoEnded"
+               /&gt;
+               
+               &lt;div class="video-info"&gt;
+                 &lt;h1&gt;{{ video?.title }}&lt;/h1&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="video-meta"&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;上传时间：{{ formatDate(video?.createdAt) }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;观看次数：{{ video?.views }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;span&gt;时长：{{ video?.duration }}&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="video-actions"&gt;
+                   &lt;el-button type="primary" @click="toggleLike"&gt;
+                     &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;star /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
+                     {{ isLiked ? '已收藏' : '收藏' }}
+                   &lt;/el-button&gt;
+                   &lt;el-button type="success" @click="downloadVideo" v-if="isMember"&gt;
+                     &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;download /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
+                     下载视频
+                   &lt;/el-button&gt;
+                   &lt;el-button type="warning" @click="goToMember" v-else&gt;
+                     &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;lock /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
+                     开通会员
+                   &lt;/el-button&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             
+             &lt;div class="video-description"&gt;
+               &lt;h2&gt;课程简介&lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;p&gt;{{ video?.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/el-col&gt;
+           
+           &lt;el-col :span="8"&gt;
+             &lt;div class="related-videos"&gt;
+               &lt;h2&gt;相关课程&lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;el-card v-for="item in relatedVideos" :key="item.id" class="related-video-card" @click="goToVideo(item.id)"&gt;
+                 &lt;img :src="item.cover" class="related-video-cover"&gt;
+                 &lt;div class="related-video-info"&gt;
+                   &lt;h3&gt;{{ item.title }}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                   &lt;p&gt;{{ item.duration }}&lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/el-card&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/el-col&gt;
+         &lt;/el-row&gt;
+       &lt;/el-main&gt;
+       
+       &lt;el-footer&gt;
+         &lt;nav-footer /&gt;
+       &lt;/el-footer&gt;
+     &lt;/el-container&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/template&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;script setup&gt;
+ import { ref, onMounted, computed } from 'vue'
+ import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
+ import { useVideoStore } from '../stores/video'
+ import { useUserStore } from '../stores/user'
+ import { Star, Download, Lock } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
+ import NavHeader from '../components/NavHeader.vue'
+ import NavFooter from '../components/NavFooter.vue'
+ import dayjs from 'dayjs'
+ 
+ const route = useRoute()
+ const router = useRouter()
+ const videoStore = useVideoStore()
+ const userStore = useUserStore()
+ 
+ const video = ref(null)
+ const isLiked = ref(false)
+ const relatedVideos = ref([])
+ const playerOptions = ref({
+   autoplay: false,
+   controls: true,
+   sources: [],
+   poster: '',
+   width: '100%',
+   height: '500px'
+ })
+ 
+ const isMember = computed(() =&gt; userStore.user?.isMember)
+ 
+ onMounted(async () =&gt; {
+   const videoId = route.params.id
+   await loadVideo(videoId)
+   await loadRelatedVideos()
+ })
+ 
+ const loadVideo = async (id) =&gt; {
+   const videoData = await videoStore.getVideoById(id)
+   if (videoData) {
+     video.value = videoData
+     playerOptions.value.sources = [{
+       src: videoData.url,
+       type: 'video/mp4'
+     }]
+     playerOptions.value.poster = videoData.cover
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const loadRelatedVideos = async () =&gt; {
+   await videoStore.fetchVideos()
+   relatedVideos.value = videoStore.videos.slice(0, 5)
+ }
+ 
+ const onTimeUpdate = (event) =&gt; {
+   const currentTime = event.target.currentTime
+   const duration = event.target.duration
+   const progress = (currentTime / duration) * 100
+   
+   if (isMember.value) {
+     videoStore.updateWatchProgress(video.value.id, progress)
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const onVideoEnded = () =&gt; {
+   if (isMember.value) {
+     videoStore.updateWatchProgress(video.value.id, 100)
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const toggleLike = () =&gt; {
+   isLiked.value = !isLiked.value
+ }
+ 
+ const downloadVideo = async () =&gt; {
+   try {
+     await videoStore.downloadVideo(video.value.id)
+   } catch (error) {
+     ElMessage.error('下载失败，请稍后重试')
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const goToVideo = (id) =&gt; {
+   router.push(&#96;/video/${id}&#96;)
+ }
+ 
+ const goToMember = () =&gt; {
+   router.push('/member')
+ }
+ 
+ const formatDate = (date) =&gt; {
+   return dayjs(date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .video-detail {
+   min-height: 100vh;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-player {
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-info {
+   margin: 20px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-info h1 {
+   margin: 0 0 10px 0;
+   font-size: 24px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-meta {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: 20px;
+   color: #666;
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-description {
+   margin: 20px 0;
+   padding: 20px;
+   background-color: #f5f7fa;
+   border-radius: 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-description h2 {
+   margin: 0 0 10px 0;
+   font-size: 18px;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-videos {
+   position: sticky;
+   top: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-videos h2 {
+   margin: 0 0 20px 0;
+   font-size: 18px;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-video-card {
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+   cursor: pointer;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-video-cover {
+   width: 100%;
+   height: 120px;
+   object-fit: cover;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-video-info {
+   padding: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-video-info h3 {
+   margin: 0 0 5px 0;
+   font-size: 14px;
+ }
+ 
+ .related-video-info p {
+   margin: 0;
+   color: #666;
+   font-size: 12px;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt; 
```

```diff
+ &lt;script setup&gt;
+ import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'
+ import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
+ import { useUserStore } from '../stores/user'
+ import { useVideoStore } from '../stores/video'
+ import { User, VideoCamera, Star, Ticket, Money } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
+ import NavHeader from '../components/NavHeader.vue'
+ import NavFooter from '../components/NavFooter.vue'
+ import dayjs from 'dayjs'
+ 
+ const router = useRouter()
+ const userStore = useUserStore()
+ const videoStore = useVideoStore()
+ 
+ const activeMenu = ref('profile')
+ const profileForm = ref({
+   name: '',
+   idCard: '',
+   phone: '',
+   email: ''
+ })
+ const watchHistory = ref([])
+ const favorites = ref([])
+ const orders = ref([])
+ const selectedPlan = ref(null)
+ 
+ const membershipPlans = [
+   {
+     id: 1,
+     name: '月度会员',
+     price: 99,
+     period: '月',
+     features: [
+       '无限观看所有课程',
+       '下载课程资料',
+       '专属客服支持'
+     ]
+   },
+   {
+     id: 2,
+     name: '季度会员',
+     price: 249,
+     period: '季',
+     features: [
+       '无限观看所有课程',
+       '下载课程资料',
+       '专属客服支持',
+       '优先参与线下活动'
+     ]
+   },
+   {
+     id: 3,
+     name: '年度会员',
+     price: 899,
+     period: '年',
+     features: [
+       '无限观看所有课程',
+       '下载课程资料',
+       '专属客服支持',
+       '优先参与线下活动',
+       '赠送线下课程优惠券'
+     ]
+   }
+ ]
+ 
+ onMounted(async () =&gt; {
+   await loadUserProfile()
+   await loadWatchHistory()
+   await loadFavorites()
+   await loadOrders()
+ })
+ 
+ const loadUserProfile = async () =&gt; {
+   const user = userStore.user
+   if (user) {
+     profileForm.value = {
+       name: user.name,
+       idCard: user.idCard,
+       phone: user.phone,
+       email: user.email
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const loadWatchHistory = async () =&gt; {
+   await videoStore.getWatchHistory()
+   watchHistory.value = videoStore.watchHistory
+ }
+ 
+ const loadFavorites = async () =&gt; {
+   // TODO: 实现收藏列表加载
+ }
+ 
+ const loadOrders = async () =&gt; {
+   // TODO: 实现订单列表加载
+ }
+ 
+ const handleSelect = (index) =&gt; {
+   activeMenu.value = index
+ }
+ 
+ const updateProfile = async () =&gt; {
+   try {
+     await userStore.updateProfile(profileForm.value)
+     ElMessage.success('个人信息更新成功')
+   } catch (error) {
+     ElMessage.error('更新失败，请稍后重试')
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const continueWatch = (video) =&gt; {
+   router.push(&#96;/video/${video.id}&#96;)
+ }
+ 
+ const goToVideo = (id) =&gt; {
+   router.push(&#96;/video/${id}&#96;)
+ }
+ 
+ const selectPlan = (planId) =&gt; {
+   selectedPlan.value = planId
+ }
+ 
+ const formatDate = (date) =&gt; {
+   return dayjs(date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .member-center {
+   min-height: 100vh;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-sidebar {
+   position: sticky;
+   top: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-info {
+   text-align: center;
+   padding: 20px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-info h2 {
+   margin: 10px 0 5px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-id {
+   color: #666;
+   font-size: 12px;
+   margin: 5px 0 10px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .member-menu {
+   border-right: none;
+ }
+ 
+ .profile-section,
+ .history-section,
+ .favorites-section,
+ .orders-section,
+ .upgrade-section {
+   padding: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .profile-section h2,
+ .history-section h2,
+ .favorites-section h2,
+ .orders-section h2,
+ .upgrade-section h2 {
+   margin: 0 0 20px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .favorite-card {
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+   cursor: pointer;
+ }
+ 
+ .favorite-cover {
+   width: 100%;
+   height: 120px;
+   object-fit: cover;
+ }
+ 
+ .favorite-info {
+   padding: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .favorite-info h3 {
+   margin: 0 0 5px 0;
+   font-size: 14px;
+ }
+ 
+ .favorite-info p {
+   margin: 0;
+   color: #666;
+   font-size: 12px;
+ }
+ 
+ .plan-card {
+   text-align: center;

+   transition: all 0.3s;
+ }
+ 
+ .plan-card:hover {
+   transform: translateY(-5px);
+ }
+ 
+ .plan-card.active {
+   border-color: #409EFF;

+ }
+ 
+ .plan-card h3 {
+   margin: 0 0 20px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .price {
+   margin: 20px 0;
+ }
+ 
+ .currency {
+   font-size: 20px;
+   color: #666;
+ }
+ 
+ .amount {
```

```diff
+   if (path.includes('statistics')) return '数据统计'
+   return ''
```

```diff
+ import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'

+ const userChartType = ref('week')
+ const videoChartType = ref('week')
+ 
+ const userChartOption = ref({

+ 
+ const videoChartOption = ref({

+   xAxis: {

+     data: ['周一', '周二', '周三', '周四', '周五', '周六', '周日']

+   },
+   series: [{
+     data: [320, 302, 301, 334, 390, 330, 320],

+   }]

+ 
+ const latestUsers = ref([

+     name: '张三',
+     email: 'zhangsan@example.com',
+     registerTime: '2024-04-28 10:00:00'

+   {

+ const hotVideos = ref([

+ 
+ const viewAllUsers = () =&gt; {

+ }
+ 
+ const viewAllVideos = () =&gt; {

+ const formatDate = (date) =&gt; {
```

```diff
+         /&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;

+ 
+     &lt;!-- 添加/编辑用户对话框 --&gt;
+     &lt;el-dialog
+       :title="dialogTitle"
+       v-model="dialogVisible"
+       width="500px"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;el-form
+         ref="userForm"
+         :model="userForm"
+         :rules="rules"
+         label-width="100px"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="用户名" prop="name"&gt;
+           &lt;el-input v-model="userForm.name" /&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="邮箱" prop="email"&gt;

+         &lt;el-form-item label="身份证号" prop="idCard"&gt;
+           &lt;el-input v-model="userForm.idCard" /&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="会员状态"&gt;
+           &lt;el-switch v-model="userForm.isMember" /&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="会员号" v-if="userForm.isMember"&gt;
+           &lt;el-input v-model="userForm.memberId" /&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+       &lt;/el-form&gt;
+       &lt;template #footer&gt;
+         &lt;span class="dialog-footer"&gt;
+           &lt;el-button @click="dialogVisible = false"&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
+           &lt;el-button type="primary" @click="saveUser"&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
+         &lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;/template&gt;
+     &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/template&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;script setup&gt;
+ import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue'
+ import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
+ import dayjs from 'dayjs'
+ 
+ const loading = ref(false)
+ const searchQuery = ref('')
+ const currentPage = ref(1)
+ const pageSize = ref(10)
+ const total = ref(100)
+ const dialogVisible = ref(false)
+ const dialogTitle = ref('添加用户')
+ const userForm = ref({
+   name: '',
+   email: '',
+   phone: '',
+   idCard: '',
+   isMember: false,
+   memberId: ''
+ })
+ 
+ const rules = {
+   name: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入用户名', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   email: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入邮箱', trigger: 'blur' },
+     { type: 'email', message: '请输入正确的邮箱格式', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   phone: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入电话', trigger: 'blur' },
+     { pattern: /^1[3-9]\d{9}$/, message: '请输入正确的手机号', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   idCard: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入身份证号', trigger: 'blur' },
+     { pattern: /(^\d{15}$)|(^\d{18}$)|(^\d{17}(\d|X|x)$)/, message: '请输入正确的身份证号', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ]
+ }
+ 
+ // 模拟用户数据
+ const users = ref([
+   {
+     id: 1,
+     name: '张三',
+     email: 'zhangsan@example.com',
+     phone: '13800138000',
+     idCard: '110101199001011234',
+     isMember: true,
+     memberId: 'M2024001',
+     registerTime: '2024-04-28 10:00:00'
+   },
+   {
+     id: 2,
+     name: '李四',
+     email: 'lisi@example.com',
+     phone: '13800138001',
+     idCard: '110101199001011235',
+     isMember: false,
+     registerTime: '2024-04-28 09:30:00'
+   }
+ ])
+ 
+ const filteredUsers = computed(() =&gt; {
+   return users.value.filter(user =&gt; {
+     const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase()
+     return (
+       user.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+       user.email.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
+       user.phone.includes(query) ||
+       user.memberId?.toLowerCase().includes(query)
+     )
+   })
+ })
+ 
+ const showAddDialog = () =&gt; {
+   dialogTitle.value = '添加用户'
+   userForm.value = {
+     name: '',
+     email: '',
+     phone: '',
+     idCard: '',
+     isMember: false,
+     memberId: ''
+   }
+   dialogVisible.value = true
+ }
+ 
+ const editUser = (row) =&gt; {
+   dialogTitle.value = '编辑用户'
+   userForm.value = { ...row }
+   dialogVisible.value = true
+ }
+ 
+ const deleteUser = async (row) =&gt; {
+   try {
+     await ElMessageBox.confirm('确定要删除该用户吗？', '提示', {
+       type: 'warning'
+     })
+     // TODO: 调用删除用户API
+     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
+   } catch (error) {
+     if (error !== 'cancel') {
+       ElMessage.error('删除失败')
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const saveUser = async () =&gt; {
+   try {
+     // TODO: 调用保存用户API
+     ElMessage.success('保存成功')
+     dialogVisible.value = false
+   } catch (error) {
+     ElMessage.error('保存失败')
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; {
+   pageSize.value = val
+   // TODO: 重新加载数据
+ }
+ 
+ const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; {
+   currentPage.value = val
+   // TODO: 重新加载数据
+ }
+ 
+ const formatDate = (date) =&gt; {
+   return dayjs(date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .user-management {
+   padding: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   align-items: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .header-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .search-input {
+   width: 200px;
+ }
+ 
+ .pagination {
+   margin-top: 20px;
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: flex-end;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt;
```

```diff
+       v-model="dialogVisible"
+       width="600px"
+     &gt;
+       &lt;el-form
+         ref="videoForm"
+         :model="videoForm"
+         :rules="rules"
+         label-width="100px"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="标题" prop="title"&gt;
+           &lt;el-input v-model="videoForm.title" /&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="分类" prop="isInternal"&gt;
+           &lt;el-radio-group v-model="videoForm.isInternal"&gt;
+             &lt;el-radio :label="true"&gt;内部资料&lt;/el-radio&gt;
+             &lt;el-radio :label="false"&gt;外部资料&lt;/el-radio&gt;
+           &lt;/el-radio-group&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="封面" prop="cover"&gt;
+           &lt;el-upload
+             class="cover-uploader"
+             action="/api/upload"
+             :show-file-list="false"
+             :on-success="handleCoverSuccess"
+             :before-upload="beforeCoverUpload"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;img v-if="videoForm.cover" :src="videoForm.cover" class="cover"&gt;
+             &lt;el-icon v-else class="cover-uploader-icon"&gt;&lt;plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
+           &lt;/el-upload&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="视频文件" prop="url"&gt;
+           &lt;el-upload
+             class="video-uploader"
+             action="/api/upload"
+             :show-file-list="false"
+             :on-success="handleVideoSuccess"
+             :before-upload="beforeVideoUpload"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;el-button type="primary"&gt;上传视频&lt;/el-button&gt;
+           &lt;/el-upload&gt;
+           &lt;div v-if="videoForm.url" class="video-preview"&gt;
+             &lt;video :src="videoForm.url" controls&gt;&lt;/video&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+         &lt;el-form-item label="描述" prop="description"&gt;
+           &lt;el-input
+             v-model="videoForm.description"
+             type="textarea"
+             :rows="4"
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
+       &lt;/el-form&gt;
+       &lt;template #footer&gt;
+         &lt;span class="dialog-footer"&gt;
+           &lt;el-button @click="dialogVisible = false"&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
+           &lt;el-button type="primary" @click="saveVideo"&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
+         &lt;/span&gt;
+       &lt;/template&gt;
+     &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/template&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;script setup&gt;
+ import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue'
+ import { Search, Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
+ import dayjs from 'dayjs'
+ 
+ const loading = ref(false)
+ const searchQuery = ref('')
+ const currentPage = ref(1)
+ const pageSize = ref(10)
+ const total = ref(100)
+ const dialogVisible = ref(false)
+ const dialogTitle = ref('添加视频')
+ const videoForm = ref({
+   title: '',
+   isInternal: false,
+   cover: '',
+   url: '',
+   description: ''
+ })
+ 
+ const rules = {
+   title: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入视频标题', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   isInternal: [
+     { required: true, message: '请选择视频分类', trigger: 'change' }
+   ],
+   cover: [
+     { required: true, message: '请上传视频封面', trigger: 'change' }
+   ],
+   url: [
+     { required: true, message: '请上传视频文件', trigger: 'change' }
+   ],
+   description: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入视频描述', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ]
+ }
+ 
+ // 模拟视频数据
+ const videos = ref([
+   {
+     id: 1,
+     title: '基础护理培训',
+     isInternal: true,
+     duration: '45分钟',
+     views: 1234,
+     uploadTime: '2024-04-28 10:00:00'
+   },
+   {
+     id: 2,
+     title: '急救知识讲解',
+     isInternal: false,
+     duration: '30分钟',
+     views: 987,
+     uploadTime: '2024-04-28 09:30:00'
+   }
+ ])
+ 
+ const filteredVideos = computed(() =&gt; {
+   return videos.value.filter(video =&gt; {
+     const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase()
+     return video.title.toLowerCase().includes(query)
+   })
+ })
+ 
+ const showAddDialog = () =&gt; {
+   dialogTitle.value = '添加视频'
+   videoForm.value = {
+     title: '',
+     isInternal: false,
+     cover: '',
+     url: '',
+     description: ''
+   }
+   dialogVisible.value = true
+ }
+ 
+ const editVideo = (row) =&gt; {
+   dialogTitle.value = '编辑视频'
+   videoForm.value = { ...row }
+   dialogVisible.value = true
+ }
+ 
+ const deleteVideo = async (row) =&gt; {
+   try {
+     await ElMessageBox.confirm('确定要删除该视频吗？', '提示', {
+       type: 'warning'
+     })
+     // TODO: 调用删除视频API
+     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
+   } catch (error) {
+     if (error !== 'cancel') {
+       ElMessage.error('删除失败')
+     }
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const saveVideo = async () =&gt; {
+   try {
+     // TODO: 调用保存视频API
+     ElMessage.success('保存成功')
+     dialogVisible.value = false
+   } catch (error) {
+     ElMessage.error('保存失败')
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const handleCoverSuccess = (response) =&gt; {
+   videoForm.value.cover = response.url
+ }
+ 
+ const handleVideoSuccess = (response) =&gt; {
+   videoForm.value.url = response.url
+ }
+ 
+ const beforeCoverUpload = (file) =&gt; {
+   const isImage = file.type.startsWith('image/')
+   const isLt2M = file.size / 1024 / 1024 &lt; 2
+ 
+   if (!isImage) {
+     ElMessage.error('封面图片只能是图片格式!')
+     return false
+   }
+   if (!isLt2M) {
+     ElMessage.error('封面图片大小不能超过 2MB!')
+     return false
+   }
+   return true
+ }
+ 
+ const beforeVideoUpload = (file) =&gt; {
+   const isVideo = file.type.startsWith('video/')
+   const isLt500M = file.size / 1024 / 1024 &lt; 500
+ 
+   if (!isVideo) {
+     ElMessage.error('只能上传视频文件!')
+     return false
+   }
+   if (!isLt500M) {
+     ElMessage.error('视频大小不能超过 500MB!')
+     return false
+   }
+   return true
+ }
+ 
+ const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; {
+   pageSize.value = val
+   // TODO: 重新加载数据
+ }
+ 
+ const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; {
+   currentPage.value = val
+   // TODO: 重新加载数据
+ }
+ 
+ const formatDate = (date) =&gt; {
+   return dayjs(date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .video-management {
+   padding: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   align-items: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .header-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   gap: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .search-input {
+   width: 200px;
+ }
+ 
+ .pagination {
+   margin-top: 20px;
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: flex-end;
+ }
+ 
+ .cover-uploader {
+   border: 1px dashed #d9d9d9;
+   border-radius: 6px;
+   cursor: pointer;
+   position: relative;
+   overflow: hidden;
+   width: 178px;
+   height: 100px;
+ }
+ 
+ .cover-uploader:hover {
+   border-color: #409EFF;
+ }
+ 
+ .cover-uploader-icon {
+   font-size: 28px;
+   color: #8c939d;
+   width: 178px;
+   height: 100px;
+   line-height: 100px;
+   text-align: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .cover {
+   width: 178px;
+   height: 100px;
+   display: block;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-preview {
+   margin-top: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .video-preview video {
+   width: 100%;
+   max-width: 400px;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt; 
```

_**Agent**_

我已经创建了视频管理页面组件。这个组件包含以下主要功能：

1. 视频列表展示
- 使用表格展示视频信息，包括ID、标题、分类、时长、观看次数和上传时间
- 支持按标题搜索视频
- 分页功能

2. 视频分类
- 使用标签区分内部资料和外部资料
- 内部资料显示红色标签，外部资料显示绿色标签

3. 视频操作
- 添加新视频
- 编辑现有视频
- 删除视频
- 每个操作都有相应的确认提示

4. 视频上传功能
- 支持上传视频封面图片（限制2MB以内）
- 支持上传视频文件（限制500MB以内）
- 提供视频预览功能

5. 表单验证
- 标题必填
- 分类必选
- 封面必传
- 视频文件必传
- 描述必填

6. 界面设计
- 使用Element Plus组件库
- 响应式布局
- 清晰的视觉层次
- 友好的用户交互

接下来，我们需要：
1. 实现与后端API的对接
2. 添加视频分类管理功能
3. 完善视频上传进度显示
4. 添加视频转码状态显示
5. 实现视频批量操作功能

您觉得这个实现怎么样？需要我调整或添加什么功能吗？

1. 在浏览器中访问：`http://localhost:5174/`

根据路由配置（`router/index.js`），访问主页时会自动加载 `Home.vue` 组件，该组件包含以下主要功能：

1. 顶部导航栏（`NavHeader.vue`）
   - 网站 Logo
   - 主导航菜单（首页、课程中心、会员中心、关于我们）
   - 用户登录/注册入口

2. 主要内容区域
   - 轮播图展示区
   - 热门课程展示
   - 会员特权介绍

3. 底部页脚（`NavFooter.vue`）
   - 关于我们
   - 快速链接
   - 联系方式
   - 社交媒体

如果您需要访问其他页面，可以通过以下路由：
- 登录页面：`http://localhost:5174/login`
- 注册页面：`http://localhost:5174/register`
- 视频详情页：`http://localhost:5174/video/:id`（需要替换具体的视频ID）
- 会员中心：`http://localhost:5174/member`
- 管理后台：`http://localhost:5174/admin`

需要注意的是：
1. 会员中心和管理后台需要登录后才能访问
2. 管理后台需要管理员权限
3. 视频详情页需要有效的视频ID

```diff
+ import { ref } from 'vue'
+ import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
+ import { useUserStore } from '../stores/user'
+ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
+ 
+ const router = useRouter()
+ const userStore = useUserStore()
+ 
+ const loginForm = ref({
+   username: '',
+   password: ''
+ })
+ 
+ const loading = ref(false)
+ const rememberMe = ref(false)
+ 
+ const rules = {
+   username: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入用户名/邮箱', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   password: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入密码', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ]
+ }
+ 
+ const handleLogin = async () =&gt; {
+   loading.value = true
+   try {
+     const success = await userStore.login({
+       username: loginForm.value.username,
+       password: loginForm.value.password,
+       remember: rememberMe.value
+     })
+     
+     if (success) {
+       ElMessage.success('登录成功')
+       if (userStore.isAdmin) {
+         router.push('/admin/dashboard')
+       } else {
+         router.push('/')
+       }
+     }
+   } catch (error) {
+     ElMessage.error('登录失败：' + error.message)
+   } finally {
+     loading.value = false
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const forgotPassword = () =&gt; {
+   // TODO: 实现忘记密码功能
+   ElMessage.info('忘记密码功能开发中')
+ }
+ 
+ const goToRegister = () =&gt; {
+   router.push('/register')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .login-container {
+   height: 100vh;
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: center;
+   align-items: center;
+   background-color: #f5f7fa;
+ }
+ 
+ .login-card {
+   width: 400px;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header {
+   text-align: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header h2 {
+   margin: 0;
+   font-size: 24px;
+   color: #303133;
+ }
+ 
+ .form-actions {
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: space-between;
+   align-items: center;
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .submit-btn {
+   width: 100%;
+   margin-bottom: 20px;
+ }
+ 
+ .register-link {
+   text-align: center;
+   font-size: 14px;
+   color: #606266;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt; 
```

</details>

```diff
+           /&gt;

+             注册

+ &lt;script setup&gt;
+ import { ref } from 'vue'
+ import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
+ import { useUserStore } from '../stores/user'
+ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
+ 
+ const router = useRouter()
+ const userStore = useUserStore()
+ 
+ const registerForm = ref({
+   username: '',
+   email: '',
+   phone: '',
+   password: '',
+   confirmPassword: ''
+ })
+ 
+ const loading = ref(false)
+ 
+ const validatePass = (rule, value, callback) =&gt; {
+   if (value === '') {
+     callback(new Error('请输入密码'))
+   } else {
+     if (registerForm.value.confirmPassword !== '') {
+       registerForm.value.confirmPassword = ''
+     }
+     callback()
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const validatePass2 = (rule, value, callback) =&gt; {
+   if (value === '') {
+     callback(new Error('请再次输入密码'))
+   } else if (value !== registerForm.value.password) {
+     callback(new Error('两次输入密码不一致!'))
+   } else {
+     callback()
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const rules = {
+   username: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入用户名', trigger: 'blur' },
+     { min: 3, max: 20, message: '长度在 3 到 20 个字符', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   email: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入邮箱地址', trigger: 'blur' },
+     { type: 'email', message: '请输入正确的邮箱地址', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   phone: [
+     { required: true, message: '请输入手机号', trigger: 'blur' },
+     { pattern: /^1[3-9]\d{9}$/, message: '请输入正确的手机号', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   password: [
+     { required: true, validator: validatePass, trigger: 'blur' },
+     { min: 6, message: '密码长度不能小于6位', trigger: 'blur' }
+   ],
+   confirmPassword: [
+     { required: true, validator: validatePass2, trigger: 'blur' }
+   ]
+ }
+ 
+ const handleRegister = async () =&gt; {
+   loading.value = true
+   try {
+     await userStore.register({
+       username: registerForm.value.username,
+       email: registerForm.value.email,
+       phone: registerForm.value.phone,
+       password: registerForm.value.password
+     })
+     
+     ElMessage.success('注册成功，请登录')
+     router.push('/login')
+   } catch (error) {
+     ElMessage.error('注册失败：' + error.message)
+   } finally {
+     loading.value = false
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ const goToLogin = () =&gt; {
+   router.push('/login')
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style scoped&gt;
+ .register-container {
+   height: 100vh;
+   display: flex;
+   justify-content: center;
+   align-items: center;
+   background-color: #f5f7fa;
+ }
+ 
+ .register-card {
+   width: 500px;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header {
+   text-align: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .card-header h2 {

+ }

+ .login-link {
+   text-align: center;
+   margin-top: 20px;
+   font-size: 14px;
+   color: #606266;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt;
```
